item.title: Not only does it not make sense, but if it does happen, it will be a much less consequence than the extreme violence that we are...
item.description:
Not only does it not make sense, but if it does happen, it will be a much less consequence than the extreme violence that we are seeing out of the American empire anyway



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: This is a beautiful sight for someone who can point to Sudan on the map
item.description:

item.title: Often times the death of an empire looks quite boring, and sometimes it is just one tanker being able to go through
item.description:

item.title: It’s almost like the people can lie as much as they want, but the money doesn’t
item.description:
